ui_login_subtitle: Enter your email and password to access your account.
ui_courses_seed_banner: Seed course: ID and slug stay fixed; other fields save as overrides until the API ships.
ui_site_footer_tagline: Compliance training that meets workers where they are — desk, field, or phone.
ui_site_footer_blurb: Houston-based ABC Safety Solutions. Self-paced online modules complement our classroom and onsite programs.
ui_home_hero_body: Our goal is to get your team back to working safely, quickly, and in compliance with the latest regulations. This portal adds self-paced online modules—slides, knowledge checks, and certificates—to the same disciplines we teach in the classroom and on site in Houston and nationwide.
ui_home_hero_image_alt: Occupational Safety & Health Training — ABC Safety Solutions
ui_home_hero_overlay_caption: Classroom, simulator, and onsite programs—plus online completion tracking.
ui_home_programs_heading: Your one stop shop training provider for all your training and compliance needs.
ui_home_programs_intro: Over 50 health, safety, and specialty skillset programs—construction, manufacturing, oil and gas, and more. Images below match the categories on
ui_home_feature_1_desc: Slide + audio flows mirror the rigor of your Houston classroom programs.
ui_home_feature_2_desc: Short assessments gate completion so credentials mean something on site.
ui_home_feature_3_desc: PDF certificates (via API later) + dashboard storage for audits and renewals.
ui_home_featured_blurb: Same disciplines as onsite training—packaged for remote completion with a polished learner experience.
ui_learn_no_test_warning: No published test is set for this course in Admin → Tests. Showing a sample question.
ui_learn_demo_question_title: Sample question: What is the primary goal of workplace safety training?
ui_learn_sample_question_title: Sample question: What is the primary goal of workplace safety training?
ui_learn_enroll_first: Enroll in this course from the catalog before opening the player.
ui_learn_pay_first: Complete payment for this course before opening the player.
ui_learn_pass_saved_blurb: Your completion record is saved on this device. PDF email will connect when the API is live.
ui_learn_fail_message: Not quite — review the material and try again.

ui_catalog_no_results: No courses match your search or filters.
ui_register_err_reserved: This email is already registered. Use Sign in instead.

ui_register_aside_modules: Structured modules, knowledge checks, and completion records in one place.
ui_register_cert_blurb_suffix: stay on this device until backend auth ships.
ui_register_form_hint: Use your work email and legal name as they should appear on certificates.
ui_certificates_pdf_blurb: PDF email delivery will connect to NestJS. Records below are from local cache.
ui_certificates_sample_hint: Sample layout only. Pass a course knowledge check to earn a certificate with your name.
ui_verify_intro: Enter a certificate ID to confirm validity and view the official credential.
ui_forgot_main_intro: Enter your email. You will receive reset instructions when outbound email is enabled for this environment.
ui_forgot_sent_ok: If that email is registered, reset instructions will arrive shortly.
ui_forgot_err: Something went wrong. Try again later.
ui_account_admin_profile_locked: Admin name and credentials are managed on the server, not from this screen.
ui_checkout_err: Checkout failed. Try again or contact support.
ui_checkout_no_course: Pick a course from the catalog first.
ui_checkout_stripe_fail: Stripe is not available. Complete enrollment without payment or enable Stripe on the server.
ui_admin_slides_help: Optional. Up to {{max}} items: images, PDF decks, or video. Shown in order in the learner player.
ui_learn_pdf_hint: PDF — use player controls; embedded video and images play inside the document.
ui_learn_video_hint: Watch the full video to unlock the knowledge check.
ui_learn_video_watch_full: Watch the full video to unlock the knowledge check.
ui_learn_video_complete: Video completed. You can take the knowledge check.
ui_course_format_video: Video-based training — complete the video to unlock the test
ui_admin_format_pptx_help: Learners move through slides with Previous / Next, then take the knowledge check.
ui_admin_format_video_help: Learners watch the full video; when it finishes, the knowledge check unlocks.
ui_course_detail_step1_desc: Secure checkout. Your course unlocks immediately in My learning.
ui_course_detail_step2_desc: Work through slides or video on any device. Progress saves automatically.
ui_course_detail_step3_desc: Take the knowledge check. Pass to download your certificate—ready to verify.
ui_course_detail_cta_subline: Join teams who train between job sites and stay compliant.
ui_course_detail_secure_line: Secure payment · progress saved to your account
ui_course_detail_why_1: Built for busy crews—start, pause, and resume anytime.
ui_course_detail_why_2: Clear knowledge check so you know you're job-ready.
ui_course_detail_faq_q1: How long do I have to finish?
ui_course_detail_faq_a1: Go at your own pace. There is no daily time limit—complete the content and test when you're ready.
ui_course_detail_faq_a2: You receive a completion certificate you can download and share. Employers can verify it on our site.
ui_course_detail_faq_q3: Can I access it on my phone?
ui_course_detail_faq_a3: Yes. The course player works in your browser on phone, tablet, or desktop.
ui_course_detail_outcome_default: Practical safety training you can apply on the job the same week you complete it.
ui_admin_course_discount_hint: Shown on catalog and applied at checkout (0 = no sale).
ui_admin_promo_blurb: Create codes to share with learners. They stack on top of any course sale discount at checkout.
